resultData.title: ORDINARY PONG with a chance of mixing genres

game.title: ORDINARY PONG with a chance of mixing genres
game.short_text: The title says it all :)

details.title: ORDINARY PONG with a chance of mixing genres
details.description:
For the best quality experience, please download the game.
Made for Mix & Jam in 48 hours.
Controls                               Key-bindings                                                                                Paddle MovementUp Arrow & Down Arrow (or W & S)ShootSpace keyExit To Main MenuEscape key
Join the official Discord server to stay updated with the game and chat with the developer!
 Brief explanation of each mode:
Easy mode - infinite play; you have 5 health points.Hard mode - infinite play; you have 1 health point.Tutorial - a tutorial level, with explanations at each appearance of a genre.
 Known bugs:
Slight delay of visual background effects in Tutorial.Leaderboard not working in WebGL build.Ping pong ball phasing through the screen boundaries at rare occasions.
 Credits:
Programming - Danial Jumagaliyev, Cactus, Zhubanysh BurlibaevPixel Art - Zhubanysh BurlibaevSound Effects - KINGOFMUSICMusic - TeknoAxe

game.title: Bees in a Trenchcoat
game.short_text: You're bees - but no one can know. Complete missions, with stealth and puzzles.

details.title: Bees in a Trenchcoat
details.description:
Made as a submission to the Mix and Jam Game JamAs bees in a trenchcoat, you must not bee seen by anyone while completing puzzles to get to the end of each level!
KNOWN BUGS
When switching levels, the game needs to restart or it breaks.
Players can spawn outside the invisible walls with splitting.
The second level has no invisible walls.
Controls
WASD - move
Click - interact / use / drag objects
F - place a hive
Spacebar - drop the trenchcoat

We took the theme and used the genres Stealth and Puzzles - and when you are bees, doing anything is a puzzle and staying hidden is a must. Because humans hate bees, but it's ok because we hate them back!Extract and play

game.short_text: Protect yourself from the hordes of evil robots using turrets!
game.title: BoxCo: Next Day Delivery (+CO-OP)

details.title: BoxCo: Next Day Delivery (+CO-OP)
details.description:
Made for Mix and Game Jam 2020!
The theme is to mix genres so we mixed Zombie survival with Tower defence!
This game can be played solo or with friends!
This game was made within the 2 days given to us for the Jam!


   Aim of the game   
Construct turrets to defeat the hordes of enemies trying to attack you! See how many rounds you can get through!


   Controls   
Select turret = E / F / Gamepad Y
Place turret = Left mouse / Gamepad Right Trigger
Cancel place turret = Right mouse / Gamepad B
Revive player = Left mouse / Gamepad Right Trigger
Move = WASD / Gamepad Left Stick
Look = Mouse / Gamepad Right Stick

   Joining a friend   
Playing over the Internet:
Port forward port 7777 (UDP)Find your IP on Google by searching "What is my IP?"Send your IP to the people you want to play with They put the IP into the text entry box and press "JOIN VIA IP"
Playing on a local network:
Open Command Prompt > Type "ipconfig" > Find "IPv4 Address"Send your IP to the people you want to play with 
They put the IP into the text entry box and press "JOIN VIA IP"


   Credit   
Programming / Lighting by dscottwilson.net / dscottwilson.itch.io
3D Modelling / Gameplay Design by niallcrabtree.com / niallcrabtree.itch.io

game.short_text: Peggle and roguelike mix
game.title: Pegglelike

details.title: Pegglelike
details.description:
Turn based prototype mix between Peggle and Roguelike, where strength of your hero actions depends on how good you are doing at Peggle.
This version is very limited, non responsive and buggy, due to my time constraints during jam, but hopefully you will enjoy it. 
Purple pegs are critical hit pegs, they double currently gathered value. After winning three chests will appear, shoot one of them with your ball to get the reward. 
Made for 2020 Mix and Jam, with theme "Mixing genres".

game.title: Mine Racer
game.short_text: Minesweeper inspired racing puzzler

details.title: Mine Racer
details.description:
Made for the 2020 Mix and Jam with the theme 'combining genres' by combining puzzle and racing. Try to reveal a path through the minefield before racing for the goal!
How to play:Minesweeper:     Left click to reveal the tile     Right click to place or remove a flag     Space or click the button to switch to driving     Clicking a bomb will end this part and send you right to driving
Race:     w/up accelerate     s/down break/reverse    a and d/left and right to steer    Touching a hidden block will reveal it as if it was clicked.     Hitting a bomb will cost you one of your 3 lives and send you back to the last checkpoint.     Flags will not defuse the bombs, make sure you still avoid hitting them!     Reaching a checkpoint will restore a life and start the minesweeper mode on the next part of the track

game.short_text: Survive the onslaught of eldritch monsters by upgrading and dropping pinballs to save your hometown!
game.title: Pinball Nightmare

details.title: Pinball Nightmare
details.description:
Objective
Survive waves of monsters by crushing them with pinballsPinballs can be picked up from the minecart on the left side of the screenBetween waves, buy upgrades from the store and place them on the playing field. There are three possible upgrades and each has unique abilitiesIf you throw your ball from the upgraded position the ball gets special abilities,  each upgrade can only be used onceUse the Pinball Flippers at the bottom of the level to shoot pinballs back up at the monsters
Controls   
Arrow Keys or  A and D - Move left and rightSpace Key - Action Button (Pickup Balls / Drop Balls / Purchase Upgrades / Build Upgrades / Start new Wave)Up Arrow or W Key - Use Flippers

game.short_text: Shoot these evil red spheres as colorful circles come at you. Follow the color and stay in the rhythm.
game.title: Groove'em Up

details.title: Groove'em Up
details.description:
Shoot these evil red spheres as colorful circles come at you. Follow the color and stay in the rythm.
Groov'em Up is a Shoot'em Up/Rythm Game made in 48 hours during the Mix And Game Jam 2020.

In the White Circles, press Left click to shoot.
In the Purple Circles, press Right Click to Dash.
In the Blue Circles, don't move.
In the Orange Circles, you have to move.

Destroy the red spheres by shooting at them.

Have fun !
(I created all the music of the game during these 48 hour, but none of the sound effects)
Unzip the file and click on the .exe to launch the game. Don't move the other files elsewhere.

details.title: Rhythm of the Dead
details.description:
Rhythm of the Dead
Control Ash Lane as he hunts the undead to the rhythm of the neon-lit night!

"Rhythm of the Dead" is a challenging rhythm-shooter made for the 2020 Mix and Game Jam. Slay the undead to the beat of the music as you explore in order to survive the night!
Controls:WASD or Arrow Keys - Move
Left Mouse/Space - Attack + Hit Note
Escape - Pause Menu

All art and music were created during the 48-hour period of the jam. The jam submission page can be found here: https://itch.io/jam/mix-and-game-jam-2020/rate/822486
Full soundtrack can be found here: https://soundcloud.com/davidsoundwizard/rhythmofthedead-ost
Windows and Mac download versions are available.
Known Questions: Many players have had questions about enemy spawns, and that enemies stop spawning. Enemy spawn locations have spawn limits to discourage players from camping/not exploring the full level. If you're struggling with enemy spawns, try exploring the level a bit more!Instructions:
WINDOWS: Run the .exe to run the game!
MAC: Unzip the .zip and run the .app file to run the game!

game.short_text: Rogue-Like Puzzle game based on the popular game of Futoshiki !
game.title: Seed O.Shiki

details.title: Seed O.Shiki
details.description:
Seed O.Shiki is currently being developed into a full game named Overhaul which will be released in Summer 2021. This is the jam version that will give you a rough idea of the game. It was made in one weekend for the Mix and Game Jam. If you would like to see how this game turned out, you can check the Steam page and Wishlist Overhaul now !Seed O.Shiki is a Rogue-Like Puzzle game where you solve puzzles in randomly generated rooms to gather power ups. These upgrades will help you venture further intro the cave and face more difficult challenges.
When entering a room, you must solve a puzzle by planting seeds inside a grid. You must respect the rules: - The same amount of seeds can't be present on the same row or column. - Be mindul of the inequalities, some spots must have more seeds than the spot they are pointing towards. As long as these two rules are respected, you will you be rewarded with awesome items such as "Dad's Cuisine" or the tasy "Choco Cream". But be careful, you don't have much time to think and will be punished for your mistakes. Don't worry, if you fail you can just try again and get better and smarter !

Controls
WASD/ZQSD  : Player movement
Down Arrow : Plant seeds
Up Arrow : Retrieve seeds
Right Arrow : Increase seed number
Left Arrow : Decrease seed number
XBox Controller
Left Stick : Player movement
A : Plant seeds
X : Retrieve seeds
RB : Increase seed number
LB : Decrease seed number

Music
Dark Future by Ketsa

Additional information
This game was orginally made in one weekend for the Mix and Game Jam in November 2020 on the theme "Mixing Genres".  The team was composed of Menthalo and myself. We decided to mix a Rogue Like with a Puzzle game.  You stroll through a randomly generated cave where in order to progress, you will have to solve a grid of Futoshiki (puzzle game similar to the Sudoku) by planting the correct amount of seeds in each cell of the grid. Every room has its own grid that you should solve.  Completing a room will grant you with some valuable rewards which will come handy when progressing in the cave.

Controls (Jam)
WASD / Arrow Keys : Player movement
L : Plant seeds    K : Retrieve seeds 
E : Increase seed number    A : Decrease seed number
XBox Controller
Left Stick : Player movement

A : Plant seeds    X : Retrieve seeds
RB : Increase seed number    LB : Decrease seed number

Thank you for playing our game ! Hope you enjoyed your time !

moreInfo.Tags: 2D, Cartoon, futoshiki, Roguelike, seedoshiki, seeds, Top-Down, Unity

game.short_text: Defend your crewmates while following your captain's orders
game.title: Captain Says: FIRE!

details.title: Captain Says: FIRE!
details.description:
Welcome aboard, mateys! As the helmsman of an infamous pirate crew, you have sailed the seven seas and plundered countless treasures. But today, your ship is in peril as it is under attack by the straight-edge army. Your crew may be fearless and ruthless, but they are also notoriously fond of their rum. As a result, your officer is giving you slurred and confusing commands. Can you navigate through this drunken chaos and emerge victorious?
Captain Says: FIRE! is a thrilling action game that will test your skills as a pirate helmsman. You must steer your ship through treacherous waters, avoiding obstacles and enemy fire, while also firing your cannons at the straight-edge army. Use your arrow keys or WASD to move your ship and spacebar to shoot your cannons. But beware, your drunk officer will give you commands that may not make sense, so you must act quickly and use your best judgement to interpret their orders.

With each level, the difficulty increases as you face more challenging obstacles and enemies. You will need to be quick on your feet and have lightning-fast reflexes to keep your ship afloat and your crew alive. The fate of your pirate crew and your treasures rests on your shoulders, so keep your wits about you and always be ready for action.

But it's not all about the action. Captain Says: FIRE! also features stunning graphics and immersive sound effects that will transport you to the high seas. With every cannon blast and wave crash, you will feel like you are right in the middle of a thrilling pirate adventure.

So grab your rum and get ready for the ride of your life. Captain Says: FIRE! is a game that will keep you entertained for hours on end, with its exciting gameplay, challenging levels, and immersive graphics and sound effects. Are you ready to show the straight-edge army who's boss? Get onboard and let's set sail!

Credits:

Vilius Drumsta - Programming - https://worm00111.itch.io/
Raffaele Signori - Art 3D - https://www.artstation.com/raffaelesignori 
Vanessa Orrù - Art 3D
Emanuele Ferrari - Sound/Music/Programming

game.title: Red Duende
game.short_text: It's your first day on the job as a delivery pilot and you're under attack!

details.title: Red Duende
details.description:
Oh no! It's your first day on the job as a delivery pilot in your space base and you're under attack! Deliver resources to the different characters, but if you can't do it fast enough, their shops will get shot down down.
How to play:
Press tab to check who needs resources. Land in front of a building to open the shop menu, and left/right click there to pick up or drop off items.
Controls:Tab - Characters and MissionsUp - ForwardDown - BackLeft - LeftUp - RightLeft Click - Add item to inventoryRight Click - Remove item from inventorySpace - Boost
Developers:
Programming:Pyro - https://github.com/DylanMcBeanWrighter - https://www.instagram.com/wrightwrighter/
Music and sound:Benji - https://benji42.github.io/
Additional Programming:https://toombler.itch.io/
Art: 
Uvi Chaos - https://www.instagram.com/uvichaos/
Jacob Mobley - https://jacobmobleyart.com/

game.short_text: A short experience about struggling with your own mind.
game.title: Anxiety-a short experience

details.title: Anxiety-a short experience
details.description:
[A SHORT EXPERIENCE]
It's not exactly a game. We called it an experience. It has open interpretation for any personal mental health problems. 
[IMPORTANT MESSAGE]
If you need help, tell your loved ones first. Then ask for help from a specialist.It's extremely important. When you get the right support, your view of the world can change significantly. Life can surprise you anew.
[CREDITS]
EGID Studio Game Jam Team:
Unity developer, VFX: Szymon Rzosinski (Devil304)
3D Artist, game concept: Kamila Joanna Chmielowiec (yreron)
Composer, sound designer, game concept: Justyna Kryscio (Juice Tea)
ORIGINAL SOUNDTRACK: 


CREATED DURING MIX AND GAMEJAM 2020.
THEME: MIXING GENRES
We classificated it as art game and walking simulator.

game.short_text: Form the ultimate robot band in this bite-sized game combining two cursed genres.
game.title: Synth Pop Idle

details.title: Synth Pop Idle
details.description:
It is the year 3,000,000 AD. In the cosmic future, a rogue algorithm has combined the two most cursed game genres of all time, "gacha money sink" and "incremental idle timewaster" into one game about forming a robot musical band in ways that defy common sense.
Your goal as the band's manager is to click on buttons to purchase a random assortment of five new band members. Each member increases the amount of currency earned per second, and the rarest members can give you a huge boost, allowing you to buy even more powerful ones! Are you feeling lucky?
Played with the mouse only.
(Tip: If you pull on the Mystery Limited banner when you have all band members... something good might happen.)
Created in 48h for Mix and Game Jam 2020Code and writing by FredisonArt by PyromanticMusic by Dmytro Nebesh

moreInfo.Rating: Rated 3.5 out of 5 stars(30 total ratings)

game.short_text: Farm your way to the moon
game.title: There's Corn on the Moon

details.title: There's Corn on the Moon
details.description:
A quaint farming adventure about taking up your Uncle's old farm and bringing it back to its former glory and beyond!Grow crops, plant seeds, and build up a sizeable enterprise as you reach the final agricultural frontier.
The game takes around half an hour to beat, start to finish, and exclusively uses mouse controls.
We combined the farming simulator and idle game genres in order to create a progression from one to the other.

moreInfo.Rating: Rated 4.0 out of 5 stars(1 total ratings)
moreInfo.Author: KyoZM
